title: This Ex-Quant Had to Quit Wall Street to Build a 24/7 Stock Exchange | QFEX, Annanay Kapila
summary: Annanay Kapila, a former quantitative trader who managed billions in daily trading volume, left finance to build QFEX, a 24/7 global stock exchange. He argues that high-frequency trading extracts value through market structural flaws rather than adding genuine value, and criticizes the financial industry for trapping elite talent through high compensation.
